claim_policy: Pre-registered canonical attack-matrix evidence only when --claim-bearing-canonical was set before launch; existing support-only artifacts are not promoted.

summary.claim_boundary: Main attack-matrix claims use only utility-admissible claim-required live records. Query-budget-drop is retained as a required support-only budget-stress condition with raw live payloads. Utility failures remain in the artifact as failure-boundary records and are not relabeled or deleted.

targeted_repair_health.policy: Filtered launches may pass only as targeted repair-health evidence. They remain support-only and never satisfy the canonical full attack-matrix claim gate.

def solve(s: str) -> str:
    # Split on any whitespace, which automatically handles leading/trailing/multiple spaces
    words = s.split()
    # Reverse the list of words
    reversed_words = words[::-1]
    # Join with a single space
    return ' '.join(reversed_words)
